channel.title: Pub/Sub on Aman Goyal
channel.description: Recent content in Pub/Sub on Aman Goyal

item.title: Event-Driven Batch Processing: Managing Complex DAG Workflows
item.description: Core Concept Extend work queues into workflows (DAGs) where the output of one stage is the input to the next Pub/Sub (Kafka, SQS) serves as the “glue” that provides reliable message delivery and decoupling Core Patterns Copier: Duplicates work into multiple queues (e.g., rendering video into 4K and GIF simultaneously) Filter: Removes unwanted items via an adapter over the source Splitter: Routes items to different queues based on conditions (e.
